# Design: MVE Voice Studio 0.4 (Generate / Clone / Tune)

<!-- generated by @feature-intake — 2026-06-24 — source: docs/multi-voice-engine.md §6.2–6.4, §11.6, §13.4, §20, MVP 0.4 -->

## Problem & Intent

MVP 0.1 liefert VoiceProfile-CRUD und ein **Voice-Editor-Modal** mit gesperrten „Voice Studio (MVP 0.4)“-Platzhaltern. MVP 0.4 aktiviert die drei Kernfunktionen aus dem PRD:

1. **Generate** — Beschreibung → Attribute → passende Basisstimme (kein echtes Prompt-to-Voice)
2. **Clone** — Referenz-Audio + Consent → VoiceProfile `type=cloned`
3. **Tune** — non-destructive abgeleitetes Preset (`type=tuned`, `baseVoiceId`)

Ziel: Nutzer können im **bestehenden** `VoiceProfileEditorModal` Stimmen erzeugen, klonen und tunen — ohne zweites Voice-Studio-Screen.

## UI-Anker (bestätigt durch Codebase)

| PRD Voice Studio | Bestehender Code | 0.4 ergänzt |
|------------------|------------------|-------------|
| Stimme manuell anlegen | `CharacterVoiceSelector` + Kokoro | bleibt |
| Stimme aus Beschreibung | `VoiceProfileFutureSections` (locked) | Generate-Section |
| Stimme klonen | locked | Clone + Upload + Consent |
| Stimme tunen | locked | Tune-Section |
| Testtext rendern | `useMveVoicePreview` | bleibt |

**Einstieg:** Characters-Panel → `VoiceProfileEditorModal` → `VoiceProfileEditorForm`  
**Nicht:** neues Top-Level-Routing, nicht `AudioDropdownView`.

## Non-Goals (MVP 0.4 / Ponytail Rung 1)

- Echte Prompt-to-Voice-Engine (nur Attribute Matching + Katalog, PRD §6.2)
- OpenVoice/ElevenLabs Clone als Pflicht — Request-Records + Stub; Eval `tickets/todo-T65-*`
- Performance Reference (MVP 0.5)
- Globale Voice-Library außerhalb des Charakter-Modals
- Render Line/Takes (MVP 0.2) — VoiceProfiles werden erzeugt; Rendering nutzt sie später
- Cloud-MVE-Persistenz (lokal first)

## Assumptions

- Schema-Typen `generated` / `cloned` / `tuned` und `consentStatus` existieren bereits (`enums.ts`, `voice-profile.ts`).
- Lokale Referenz-Audio-Pfade analog `persistClipAudioFile` → `.scriptony/assets/`.
- Cloud-Clone optional über `scriptony-audio-story` wenn `canUseCloudSession()`.
- Consent-Text versioniert (`consentTextVersion` Konstante in `src/lib/mve/safety/`).

## Was im Repo schon da ist

- `src/lib/multi-voice-engine/schema/voice-profile.ts` — VoiceProfile inkl. consent, baseVoiceId, attributes
- `src/components/characters/VoiceProfileEditorModal.tsx` — Modal-Shell
- `src/components/characters/VoiceProfileEditorForm.tsx` — Form + Beschreibungsfeld
- `src/components/characters/VoiceProfileFutureSections.tsx` — disabled 0.4-Platzhalter
- `src/backend/local/LocalMveVoiceProfileRepository.ts` — SQLite CRUD
- `src/lib/local-project-audio.ts` — lokaler Audio-Upload in Projekt-Assets
- `src/hooks/useLocalVoices.ts` — Kokoro-Katalog
- `src/lib/mve/resolve-tts-voice-id.ts` — TTS-Voice-Auflösung
- `functions/scriptony-audio-story/` — Cloud-TTS-Routen (Pattern für neue Voice-Routen)
- GitHub #3 (Schema), #4 (SQLite) closed; #6 (Characters-Panel) open

## Decision

**Chosen:** 5 vertikale Issues — Schema/Consent-Datenpfad → Generate → Clone (+ Consent/Upload) → Tune → UI-Aktivierung im bestehenden Modal.

**Why:** PRD trennt Consent/Clone von Generate/Tune; UI-Platzhalter existieren — ein finales UI-Issue verdratet alle Flows ohne Parallel-Modal.

## Runtime matrix (MVP 0.4)

| Slice | Local desktop | Cloud session | Functions |
|-------|---------------|---------------|-----------|
| VoiceConsent + Requests schema | ✅ SQLite | — | — |
| Generate (attribute match) | ✅ Kokoro-Katalog | ✅ optional LLM extract | optional |
| Consent + ref upload | ✅ assets/voice-refs | ✅ storage route | optional |
| Clone request | ✅ stub/record | ✅ hybrid | ✅ `/voices/clone` |
| Tune preset | ✅ | — | — |
| Voice Studio UI | ✅ | gate Clone cloud | — |

## Cross-Domain Sign-Off

| Domain | Status | Note |
|--------|--------|------|
| KISS | ✅ | Attribute matching statt Voice-Gen-API |
| SOLID | ✅ | Voice-Module ≠ UI; Safety/Consent separat |
| DRY | ✅ | Reuse Modal, LocalStorage, mve-adapter |
| Security | ✅ | Consent Pflicht für Clone; hash; blocked status |
| UI/UX | ✅ | Bestehendes Modal, DE copy |
| Testability | ✅ | Zod + matcher unit tests |

## Implementation Sketch

```
src/lib/multi-voice-engine/schema/
  voice-consent.ts
  voice-operations.ts          # Clone/Generate/Tune inputs
src/lib/mve/
  casting/match-voice-from-description.ts
  safety/consent-text.ts
  tune/create-tuned-voice-profile.ts
src/backend/local/
  LocalMveVoiceConsentRepository.ts
src/lib/api-adapter/mve-voice-studio-adapter.ts
src/components/characters/
  VoiceStudioGenerateSection.tsx
  VoiceStudioCloneSection.tsx
  VoiceStudioTuneSection.tsx
  VoiceProfileFutureSections.tsx  → ersetzen/entfernen
functions/scriptony-audio-story/routes/voices-clone.ts   # cloud hybrid
```

## Deferred (nicht 0.4 Issues)

- MVP 0.2 Render Line/Takes, 0.3 Scene Mix
- MVP 0.5 Performance Reference
- OpenVoice Sidecar (T65 eval)
- `embeddingUrl` Feld (PRD §8.4) — später mit echtem Clone-Adapter

## Ready for /implement

NO — Issue-Entwurf `.qa/intake/mve-voice-studio-0.4-issues.md` review → Issues anlegen → `@ecc-runner`.
